hooks.command: $lf = 'c:\Users\Henry\wkspaces\CocktailPlaner\docs\log.md'; $cf = "$env:TEMP\cocktailplaner-logcheck.txt"; if ((Test-Path $cf) -and (Test-Path $lf)) { $old = [int](Get-Content $cf); $new = (Get-Content $lf).Count; if ($new -le $old) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"MANDATORY (CLAUDE.md): docs/log.md was not updated this session. Add a log entry now if any significant action was taken (file created/edited, config changed, feature work, etc.). Skip only for single-line edits, typo fixes, reformatting, or pure chat with no tool use."}' } }
